name: ecli-markdownlint-cli2-payload
description: Pinned markdownlint-cli2 payload for the ECLI Debian 13 linter installer. Installed into /opt/ecli/payload/packages/nodejs with 'npm ci --omit=dev' using the committed package-lock.json. markdownlint-cli2 0.22.1 is the newest release supporting Node.js >=20 (Debian 13 ships nodejs 20.19.x).
